commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an `ownsCompaction`-based skip/log around `runEmbeddedAttempt`’s pre-prompt overflow precheck and a run-loop regression test for model-overflow retry.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +15. Total +25 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection reproduces the patch defect: with `ownsCompaction` true and `promptAuthority: "preassembly_may_overflow"`, the new skip branch runs before `unwindowedMessages` can reach the precheck.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow PR-branch repair can adjust the skip condition and add the missing focused regression without changing product direction.

target.title: fix(agents): skip pre-prompt precheck when context engine owns compaction
target.author: mpz4life

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
